nodes.name: LC
nodes.summary: LC表示 IUCN 无危等级，当前关联8208种鸟类，如鸵鸟、鸸鹋、南方鶴鴕等8208种鸟类。

nodes.name: 灌丛
nodes.summary: 低矮木本植物占优势的陆地生境。

nodes.name: 约翰·古尔德
nodes.summary: 约翰·古尔德是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联71种鸟类，包括绿棉凫、凍原豆雁、黄腹角雉等71种鸟类，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

nodes.name: 褐头星雀
nodes.summary: 褐头星雀（Plum-headed finch，学名 Emblema modestum），在图谱中标记为无危（LC）物种，主要分布于约翰·古尔德、澳大利亚，常见栖息地包括灌丛。

nodes.name: 澳大利亚
nodes.summary: 澳大利亚是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联221种鸟类，包括南方鶴鴕、鵲鵝、细斑树鸭等221种鸟类，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

links.label: 分布于
links.evidence: |year=2024 |title=Neochmia modesta |volume=2024 |article-number=e.T22719676A253984970 |doi=10.2305/IUCN.UK.2024-2.RLTS.T22719676A253984970.en |access-date=18 June 2025}} | taxon = Emblema modestum | authority = (Gould, 1837) | range_map = Plum-headed Finch.jpg | range_map_caption = Approximate range | synonyms = Aidemosyne modesta }} The plum-headed finch (Emblema modestum) also known as cherry finch is a common species of estrildid finch found in Australia

links.label: 分布于
links.evidence: |year=2024 |title=Neochmia modesta |volume=2024 |article-number=e.T22719676A253984970 |doi=10.2305/IUCN.UK.2024-2.RLTS.T22719676A253984970.en |access-date=18 June 2025}} | taxon = Emblema modestum | authority = (Gould, 1837) | range_map = Plum-headed Finch.jpg | range_map_caption = Approximate range | synonyms = Aidemosyne modesta }} The plum-headed finch (Emblema modestum) also known as cherry finch is a common species of estrildid finch found in Australia

links.label: 栖息于
links.evidence: It is found in dry savannah and subtropical/tropical (lowland) dry shrubland in Australia
